before_start: Прочитай этот файл и git log --oneline -20
Выбери ОДНУ задачу со статусом pending и наивысшим приоритетом
Проверь, что все dependencies этой задачи имеют статус done
during_work: Делай коммиты после каждого логического изменения
Не трогай код, не связанный с текущей задачей
before_finish: Меняй status на done ТОЛЬКО после успешного прохождения всех тестов
ЗАПРЕЩЕНО удалять или редактировать задачи — только менять status

tasks.description: RabbitMQ broker client: подключение, publish с confirms, consume, reconnect
acceptance_criteria: Publish с publisher confirms и retry (3 попытки, exponential backoff)

tasks.summary: Пакет internal/infra/broker: Client с AMQPAPI/AMQPChannelAPI интерфейсами, NewClient(address, useTLS, prefetch, log) с Ping на старте и auto-reconnect loop. Publish с publisher confirms (Confirm mode + NotifyPublish) и retry (3 попытки, exponential backoff 100ms/200ms). Subscribe с manual ACK/NACK, QoS prefetch, queue prefix orch.sub.{topic}. Auto-reconnect с exponential backoff (1s-30s) + 25% jitter, re-subscribe. Ping() health check, graceful Close() с idempotency. BrokerError тип с retryable classification. Sentinel errors: ErrClientClosed, ErrNotConnected, ErrPublishConfirmFailed, ErrPublishNacked, ErrPublishMaxRetriesExhausted. pubMu сериализует publish+confirm цикл для предотвращения confirm misattribution. 35 тестов: publish (success, confirm nack, confirm channel closed, retry transient, no retry non-retryable, max retries exhausted, context cancelled/deadline, not connected, after close, concurrent safety), subscribe (success, queue declare error, qos error, not connected, handler ack, handler nack, manual ack, queue prefix), ping (connected, disconnected, nil conn), close (graceful, idempotent, cancels context), error mapping (AMQP retryable/non-retryable, context passthrough, unknown), isRetryable, backoff delay, reconnect (confirm mode, re-subscribe, stops on done, dial fail retries), broker error formatting. Зависимость: github.com/rabbitmq/amqp091-go v1.10.0.

tasks.description: S3 Object Storage client: streaming upload, delete, retry, circuit breaker
acceptance_criteria: PutObject со streaming (io.Reader, не буферизация в память)
test_steps: Шаг 1: go test ./internal/infra/objectstorage/... — все тесты проходят

tasks.summary: Пакет internal/infra/objectstorage: Client с S3API consumer-side interface (PutObject, DeleteObject, HeadObject), NewClient(StorageConfig, CircuitBreakerConfig, Logger). PutObject принимает io.ReadSeeker для streaming upload с retry (seek перед каждой повторной попыткой). Retry: 3 попытки (1+2), exponential backoff 500ms/1s + 25% jitter. Circuit breaker (gobreaker/v2): configurable threshold/timeout/maxRequests, 4xx и NotFound не считаются failures, ErrCircuitOpen прерывает retry немедленно. Per-attempt timeouts: 30s upload, 15s HEAD/DELETE. Error classification: ErrCircuitOpen, ErrObjectNotFound sentinels, StorageError struct с Retryable flag, mapError (context passthrough, smithy.APIError classification, net.Error), isRetryable, isCBFailure. 45 тестов: PutObject (success, retry 5xx, retry timeout, retry network, no retry 403, all retries exhausted, context canceled, seek before retry, seek error), DeleteObject (success, retry, all retries, no retry 403, context canceled), HeadObject (success, NotFound, NoSuchKey, retry, no retry 403), CB (opens after threshold, 4xx doesn't trip, NotFound doesn't trip, half-open recovery, ErrCircuitOpen not retried, trips during retry), mapError (8 cases), isRetryable (6 cases), isCBFailure (5 cases), backoff delay, StorageError formatting/unwrap, context cancelled during backoff. Зависимости: aws-sdk-go-v2 v1.41.5, aws-sdk-go-v2/service/s3 v1.99.0, aws-sdk-go-v2/credentials v1.19.14, smithy-go v1.24.3, gobreaker/v2 v2.4.0.

tasks.description: Health check handler: /healthz (liveness) и /readyz (readiness)
acceptance_criteria: /readyz — 200 если Redis + RabbitMQ + DM доступны, иначе 503 с деталями
Readiness check выполняет ping Redis, ping RabbitMQ, HTTP HEAD к DM /healthz
test_steps: Шаг 1: go test ./internal/infra/health/... — все тесты проходят
Шаг 2: /healthz → 200
Шаг 3: /readyz с доступными зависимостями → 200
Шаг 4: /readyz с недоступной зависимостью → 503
tasks.summary: Пакет internal/infra/health: Handler с RedisPinger/BrokerPinger consumer-side интерфейсами и DM HTTP probe. GET /healthz — всегда 200 OK (liveness). GET /readyz — параллельные проверки Redis (Ping(ctx)), RabbitMQ (Ping()), DM (HTTP GET /healthz) с 3s timeout. Возвращает 200 {status:ready, checks:{redis:ok, rabbitmq:ok, dm:ok}} или 503 {status:not_ready, checks:{...unavailable...}}. SetNotReady() — atomic.Bool для graceful shutdown, 503 без проверок. Безопасность: ошибки не раскрываются (status: unavailable). GET-only (405 на другие методы). URL нормализация (trailing slash). DM response body drain для переиспользования TCP. 20 тестов: liveness (3), readiness healthy (2), individual/all failures (4), SetNotReady (2), error format (1), timeout Redis/DM (2), DM path (1), trailing slash (1), method restriction (2), concurrent access (1). Только stdlib зависимости.

tasks.description: CORS middleware и Security headers
acceptance_criteria: CORS middleware с конфигурацией из ORCH_CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS
Allowed methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS
Security headers: X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-Frame-Options: DENY, Strict-Transport-Security, Cache-Control: no-store для sensitive endpoints
test_steps: Шаг 1: go test — все тесты проходят
Шаг 2: OPTIONS → правильные CORS заголовки

tasks.summary: Пакет internal/ingress/api: CORSMiddleware (factory function, replaces stub) с config.CORSConfig (AllowedOrigins, MaxAge). Allowed origins O(1) lookup (map), wildcard '*' silently ignored (incompatible with credentials). Preflight (OPTIONS + Access-Control-Request-Method): 204 No Content, CORS headers set only for allowed origins, Vary: Origin, Access-Control-Request-Method, Access-Control-Request-Headers. Actual request: CORS headers (Allow-Origin, Allow-Credentials: true, Expose-Headers: X-Request-ID, X-Correlation-Id, Retry-After) for allowed origins only, Vary: Origin always. Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS. Allow-Headers: Authorization, Content-Type, X-Correlation-Id. SecurityHeadersMiddleware (global, after CORS): generates/validates correlation ID (X-Correlation-Id), sets X-Request-ID + X-Correlation-Id response headers, injects RequestContext into ctx, sets X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-Frame-Options: DENY, Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains, Cache-Control: no-store (overridable by handlers). isValidCorrelationID: max 128 bytes, printable ASCII only (0x20-0x7E), invalid → generate UUID v4. Propagates correlation ID on request header for downstream middleware (auth). Wiring: Deps.CORSConfig added, server.go chain Recovery→CORS→SecurityHeaders, app.go passes cfg.CORS. 35 новых тестов (+ 23 sub-tests): CORS (15 — no origin, allowed/disallowed actual, preflight allowed/disallowed, empty origins, wildcard, multiple origins ×3, case sensitive, OPTIONS without request-method, no-call-handler, expose/allow/methods headers, empty string origin), SecurityHeaders (7 — all present, generated/client ID, request header propagation, context injection, cache-control override, unique IDs ×100), CID validation (4 — too long, control chars, max length, isValidCorrelationID ×16 subtests), integration (2 — CORS+SecurityHeaders combo, preflight short-circuit), server-level (7 — headers on every response ×4 endpoints, CORS allowed/disallowed, preflight 204, default same-origin, X-Request-ID preserved). Code review: S-1 isValidCorrelationID validation added, M-1 X-Correlation-Id casing standardized, N-1 PATCH added to Allow-Methods, N-3 test name clarified. Нет новых зависимостей (uuid, config, logger уже в go.mod).

tasks.summary: Пакет internal/ingress/middleware/ratelimit: Middleware struct (store, readRPS, writeRPS, enabled, log), NewMiddleware(cfg, store, log) с валидацией (nil store при enabled, RPS > 0). Handler() → chi-compatible middleware: disabled → no-op pass-through (zero overhead), enabled → AuthContext extraction → operationClass(method) → rateLimitKey(orgID, class) → store.Allow(ctx, key, limit, 1s window) → allowed/rejected/error. Method classification: GET/HEAD → read (ReadRPS), POST/PUT/DELETE/PATCH → write (WriteRPS). Redis failure → degrade (allow request + WARN log). Missing AuthContext → 500 INTERNAL_ERROR. Rate exceeded → 429 + Retry-After: 1 + JSON RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED (Russian messages from error catalog). RateLimiterStore consumer-side interface (Allow(ctx, key, limit, window) → (bool, error)). RedisStore: Lua script (INCR + PEXPIRE atomically, PEXPIRE set only on first request in window), evalFunc indirection for testability. NewRedisStore(redis.Cmdable) wraps Eval→Int64. Redis key format: rl:{org_id}:{read|write}, TTL 1s. kvstore.Client.RawRedis() → any (expose underlying *redis.Client for Lua script access). Wiring: Deps.RateLimitMiddleware injected into server.go, registerRoutes uses injected middleware (stub removed from middleware.go), app.go creates RedisStore via kvClient.RawRedis()→redis.Cmdable type assertion. Code review (code-reviewer): M-1 ReadRPS/WriteRPS > 0 validation added in NewMiddleware (defense-in-depth beyond config.Validate), M-2 zero/negative RPS tests added. 34 тестов (+ 10 sub-tests): constructor (6 — nil store enabled/disabled, success, zero read/write RPS, negative RPS), disabled (2 — pass-through, no store call), allowed (2 — GET read, POST write), exceeded (2 — GET 429, POST 429), Redis unavailable (2 — GET/POST degraded), missing AuthContext (1 — 500), method classification (4 — HEAD read, PUT/DELETE/PATCH write), key format (1 — UUID org), context cancelled (1 — degraded), response format (2 — content-type, Russian message+suggestion), per-org isolation (1), operationClass table (7 sub-tests), rateLimitKey table (3 sub-tests), concurrent safety (1), store tests (7 — allow true/false, Redis error, correct args, context forwarded, window ms, interface check). Нет новых зависимостей (redis/go-redis уже в go.mod).

Headers: X-Organization-ID, X-User-ID, X-Correlation-ID из auth.AuthContext и logger.RequestContext. Retry: retryMax (default 3) total attempts, exponential backoff 200ms×2^(n-1) + 25% jitter. Per-attempt timeout (read 5s, write 10s). CB: gobreaker/v2, FailureThreshold/Timeout/MaxRequests configurable, 4xx/context.Canceled не считаются failures. Error types: ErrCircuitOpen, ErrDMUnavailable sentinels, DMError struct (Operation, StatusCode, Body, Retryable, Cause). Response body limit 10MB (io.LimitReader). URL path escaping (url.PathEscape). Error log on retry exhaustion. CheckRedirect disabled для GetArtifact 302. setHeaders из original ctx (не per-attempt). 47 тестов: headers (1), CreateDocument success/400 (2), GetDocument success/404/409 (3), retry 5xx-then-success/exhausted (2), DeleteDocument (1), ArchiveDocument (1), CreateVersion (1), ListVersions (1), GetVersion (1), ListArtifacts (1), GetArtifact JSON/302/302-no-location/404 (4), GetDiff (1), ListAuditRecords (1), context cancel/during-backoff (2), CB open/4xx-no-trip/half-open/not-retried/trips-mid-retry (5), backoff (1), DMError formatting/unwrap (3), isRetryable (5), isCBFailure (4), mapHTTPError (3), mapTransportError (4), empty context (1), query params (1), interface check (1). tasks.summary: Пакет internal/egress/uomclient: UOMClient интерфейс (4 метода), Client struct с http.Client, retry logic (2 total attempts, fixed 200ms backoff, NO circuit breaker — fast fail для auth UX). Методы: Login (POST /api/v1/auth/login → LoginResponse с access_token, refresh_token, token_type, expires_in, user profile), Refresh (POST /api/v1/auth/refresh → RefreshResponse), Logout (POST /api/v1/auth/logout → 204 No Content), GetMe (GET /api/v1/users/me → UserProfile). Headers: X-Correlation-ID из RequestContext, X-User-ID из AuthContext (для service-to-service). Per-attempt timeout 5s. Response body limit 1MB. Error types: UOMError struct (Operation, StatusCode, Body, Retryable, Cause), mapHTTPError (4xx non-retryable, 5xx retryable), mapTransportError (context passthrough, net.Error retryable). Error catalog расширен: ErrAuthServiceUnavailable (502), ErrInvalidCredentials (401), ErrTokenRevoked (401), ErrRefreshTokenExpired (401) с русскими сообщениями. MapUOMError: 5xx→AUTH_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE, 401→credential errors (INVALID_CREDENTIALS/TOKEN_EXPIRED/TOKEN_REVOKED), 4xx→VALIDATION_ERROR. 36 тестов UOM client: Login (success, invalid credentials, UOM down retry 2x, retry-then-success, no retry on 401, bad JSON response, bad request 400, empty body 200), Refresh (success, token expired, token revoked, UOM down 503), Logout (success 204, UOM down 502), GetMe (success with auth headers, 404, UOM down, without auth context), headers (correlation ID, no auth context, with auth context), context (canceled, canceled during backoff), transport error (connection refused), UOMError (formatting 3 cases, unwrap), isRetryable (5 subtests), mapHTTPError (7 subtests), mapTransportError (4 cases), response body limit, empty context, concurrent safety, constructor. 17 тестов UOM error mapping: MapUOMError (13 cases covering 5xx/401/4xx), catalog completeness (4 new codes). tasks.description: Contract Upload Coordinator: multipart upload → S3 → DM → DP → 202
acceptance_criteria: Валидация: размер ≤ 20 МБ (ORCH_UPLOAD_MAX_SIZE), MIME = application/pdf, magic bytes %PDF-
Filename sanitization (strip path traversal, control chars)
Redis: upload tracking {correlation_id → document_id, version_id, status}
Ответ 202 Accepted: {contract_id, version_id, job_id, status: QUEUED}
Cleanup при ошибке: удаление файла из S3 если DM или RabbitMQ отказали
test_steps: Шаг 1: go test — все тесты проходят
Шаг 2: upload PDF 5MB → 202 с contract_id, version_id, job_id
Шаг 3: upload файл > 20MB → 413 FILE_TOO_LARGE
Шаг 4: upload .docx → 415 UNSUPPORTED_FORMAT
Шаг 5: DM недоступен → 502, файл из S3 удалён
tasks.summary: Пакет internal/application/upload: Handler struct с consumer-side интерфейсами (ObjectStorage, DMClient, CommandPublisher, KVStore). Handle() → http.HandlerFunc: auth context extraction → correlation_id/job_id generation → MaxBytesReader body limit → multipart parsing → title validation (trim, length ≤500 runes, control char rejection) → file validation (size ≤ maxSize, MIME=application/pdf, magic bytes %PDF-) → filename sanitization (path traversal, control chars, UTF-8-aware truncation to 255 bytes, fallback upload.pdf) → streaming S3 upload с checksumReadSeeker (SHA-256 via io.TeeReader, hash reset on Seek(0) for retry) → DM CreateDocument → DM CreateVersion (origin_type=UPLOAD) → PublishProcessDocument command → Redis tracking (upload:{org}:{job}, TTL 1h) → 202 Accepted {contract_id, version_id, version_number, job_id, status:UPLOADED, message}. Compensating cleanup: S3 delete on DM failure, orphan document logging on CreateVersion failure, CRITICAL log on broker failure (no rollback — version exists), WARN on Redis failure (non-critical). Wiring: UploadHandler в Deps struct, uploadH parameter в registerRoutes, POST /contracts/upload mapped. 34 теста: happy path (1), auth (1), title validation (7 — empty, whitespace, too long, boundary 500, unicode 500/501, control chars/tab/null), file validation (5 — missing, too large, unsupported MIME, invalid magic, too short, empty), infrastructure failures+cleanup (5 — S3 failure, DM CreateDoc+cleanup, DM CreateVer+cleanup, broker no-cleanup, Redis non-critical), data integrity (4 — checksum, S3 key format, Redis tracking, published command fields), non-multipart (1), sanitizeFilename (16 subtests — normal, path traversal fwd/bwd/embedded, null/control/DEL chars, empty/dot/dotdot fallback, long truncation, unicode, spaces, absolute/windows path, UTF-8 truncation), checksumReadSeeker (1), body size limit (1), containsControlChars (8 subtests). Code review: S-1 MaxBytesReader fixed, M-2 orphan doc logging added, M-3 title control chars rejection, M-4 UTF-8-aware truncation, M-1 retry contract documented. Нет новых зависимостей.

tasks.summary: Graceful shutdown реализован как 7-фазный упорядоченный процесс. SSE Handler: добавлен connection tracking (sync.Mutex + map[string]connEntry + done channel), Shutdown() метод (idempotent, signals event loops via per-connection closeCh — race-free), Done() метод, отклонение новых подключений после shutdown. App.Shutdown(): Phase 1 — SetNotReady (readiness 503), Phase 2 — SSE close (send event:close с reason:server_shutdown через closeCh, до HTTP drain чтобы SSE handlers вернулись), Phase 3 — HTTP drain (server.Shutdown ждёт in-flight requests), Phase 4 — Broker close (stops consumers), Phase 5 — Redis close (connection pool), Phase 6 — Observability flush (ObservabilityShutdown interface, nil=no-op до ORCH-TASK-032/033), Phase 7 — Done. Nil guards для broker/redis/sse/observability. Errors collected via errors.Join. main.go: timeout-based force exit (ctx.Err()==DeadlineExceeded → os.Exit(1)), double-signal force exit сохранён. Code review (code-reviewer): M-1 phase ordering fix (SSE before HTTP — http.Server.Shutdown блокирует на long-lived SSE если не отменить сначала), M-2 race condition fix (closeCh pattern вместо прямой записи в ResponseWriter из Shutdown), M-3 nil guards added. go test -race PASS. 5 SSE shutdown тестов: ClosesActiveConnections (2 conns, close event verified), Idempotent (3x safe), RejectsNewConnections, ConnectionsRemovedFromTrackingOnExit, NoConnectionsIsNoop. 4 App shutdown тестов: SSEHandlerCalled, ObservabilityError, NilSSEHandler, NilObservability. tasks.summary: Пакет internal/integration: end-to-end integration tests с in-memory fakes. 4 файла: fakes.go (fakeBroker для consumer.BrokerSubscriber + commandpub.BrokerPublisher с InjectEvent/PublishedMessages, fakeObjectStorage для upload/versions ObjectStorage с PutObject/DeleteObject/HasObject, fakeKVStore — единый in-memory KV + Pub/Sub для statustracker.KVStore/ssebroadcast.Publisher/sse.KVStore/upload.KVStore с Subscribe → fakeSubscription, fakeDMServer — httptest.Server с chi router имитирующий DM REST API (POST documents/versions, GET documents/versions/artifacts/diffs, DELETE/archive), testJWTSigner — ECDSA P-256 ES256 генерация и подпись JWT), testenv.go (testEnv struct с 18-step DI wiring зеркалирующий app.go NewApp: logger → fakeKVStore → fakeBroker → fakeObjectStorage → fakeDMServer → real ssebroadcast.Broadcaster → real statustracker.Tracker → real consumer.Consumer → testJWTSigner → real auth.Middleware → real rbac.Middleware → dmclient.Client → commandpub.Publisher → upload/contracts/versions/results/comparison/export handlers → sse.Handler → api.Server → httptest.Server. Adapters: testUploadDMAdapter, testUploadCmdPubAdapter, noopRedisPinger, noopBrokerPinger. Helpers: DoRequest, UploadContract, InjectEvent, SeedStatus), sseclient.go (sseClient с single background reader goroutine, connectSSE, WaitForConnected, NextEvent, Close), integration_test.go (5 тестов). Тест 1 TestUploadToSSEPipeline: multipart upload PDF → 202 Accepted → ProcessDocumentRequested published → S3 object created → inject DP IN_PROGRESS → SSE status_update PROCESSING → Redis status verified. Тест 2 TestRecheckPipeline: seed document+version (FULLY_READY) → POST recheck → 202 → new version created → ProcessDocumentRequested published. Тест 3 TestComparePipeline: seed document + 2 versions → POST compare → 202 COMPARISON_QUEUED → CompareDocumentVersionsRequested published with correct base/target. Тест 4 TestLICFailureToSSE: seed status ANALYZING → SSE connect → inject LIC FAILED → SSE status_update ANALYSIS_FAILED with error_code/is_retryable → Redis status ANALYSIS_FAILED. Тест 5 TestReportsReadyToResults: seed status GENERATING_REPORTS + DM version/artifacts → SSE connect → inject DM version-reports-ready → SSE status_update READY → GET /results → 200 with aggregated artifacts (risks, summary, aggregate_score from DM). go test -race -count=1 ./internal/integration/... PASS. go test -race -count=1 ./... — 28 пакетов, 0 failures. go vet clean. make build/test/lint OK. Нет новых зависимостей.
